task_completion.description: Locate the patient James Kowalski in the OpenEMR system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenEMR patient search screen or patient dashboard clearly showing the name 'James Kowalski' and DOB '1968-04-15'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the patient's medication list or prescription section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenEMR interface displaying the active medications list for James Kowalski.

task_completion.description: Discontinue Metformin due to the CKD Stage 3b contraindication.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Metformin is shown with a 'discontinued', 'inactive', or crossed-out status in the patient's medication list.

task_completion.description: Discontinue Ibuprofen due to the CKD Stage 3b contraindication.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ibuprofen is shown with a 'discontinued', 'inactive', or crossed-out status in the patient's medication list.

task_completion.description: Discontinue Nitrofurantoin due to the CKD Stage 3b contraindication.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Nitrofurantoin is shown with a 'discontinued', 'inactive', or crossed-out status in the patient's medication list.
Amlodipine, Atorvastatin, and Lisinopril are still listed as active (not discontinued) in the patient's medication list.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenEMR web interface to modify medications rather than using direct database queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenEMR web interface being clicked and navigated, not a terminal window executing MySQL commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenEMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the OpenEMR URL, and the UI matches standard OpenEMR layouts, rather than a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply write the expected JSON output directly to the result file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows or text editors (like nano/vim) open with the /tmp/medication_audit_result.json file being manually typed out.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: James Kowalski (DOB: 1968-04-15). Condition: CKD Stage 3b. The agent must discontinue the contraindicated drugs (Metformin, Ibuprofen, Nitrofurantoin) and keep the safe drugs (Amlodipine, Atorvastatin, Lisinopril) active in the OpenEMR system.
